info.title: ScoutBoy API
info.description: ScoutBoy — FUT.gg-style real-life player discovery. MVP scope: U23 attackers and midfielders in Europe. Every score/badge/value is explainable.

parameters.name: universe

schema.description: Legacy alias: 'mvp' maps to high_coverage_u23; 'all' maps to all_records. Ignored when scope is supplied.
